message:
style(render): apply rustfmt to compute_certified_into signatures and call sites

Reformats three multi-line function signatures and call sites in
diff.rs to match rustfmt's preferred single-line style where the
arguments fit within the line length limit. No logic changes — purely
formatting cleanup across the method definition and two test call
sites in span_edge_cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
